hero.badge: The heart of your AI operations
heading: Advanced Dashboard
– Your Control Centre
hero.description: Take command of your AI operations with one simple, intelligent dashboard. Your Advanced Dashboard brings together client management, analytics, customization, and real-time control — giving you full visibility over how your AI communicates, books, and performs every day. It's not just software — it's your business's central control hub.

backgroundImage.alt: Business Analytics Pro dashboard with charts and KPIs

points.label: Complete Control:
points.text: Save hours every week by replacing manual note-taking and filing.

points.label: Total Visibility:
points.text: Adjust, monitor, and train your AI anytime.

points.label: Full Cusomization:
points.text: Access all client data, analytics, and performance reports in one place.

points.label: Smart Operations:
points.text: Analyze results, optimize processes, and continually improve.

points.label: Seamless Experience:
points.text: One clean dashboard replaces multiple tools and platforms.

image.alt: Brain and laptop illustration representing productivity

keyCapabilities.heading: Key Capabilities
keyCapabilities.subheading: Your dashboard pulls everything together into one powerful, easy-to-use system.

features.title: Advanced CRM:
features.description: All client data, history, and interactions in one place.

features.title: AI Smart Calendar:
features.description: Color-coded, automatically updated, and synced across all devices.

features.title: Analytics & Insights:
features.description: See daily call volumes, number of bookings, cancellations, no-show rates, and assistant performance.

features.title: Voice Memo & Transcripts Section:
features.description: Quickly review what was said in any call or memo.

features.title: Settings & Training:
features.description: Tailor your AI to match your services, prices, and tone.

features.title: Front-End Prompts:
features.description: Easily update what your AI says to clients on the phone, website, or chat — no tech skills required.

features.title: Fully Customisable Branding:
features.description: Upload your business logo, set your theme colours, and brand the dashboard to feel like your own system — not just another generic tool.

whyChoose.heading: Why Choose the Advanced Dashboard?
points: Combines CRM, analytics, and customization in one hub
Empowers you to manage and train your AI in real time
Gives you transparency into every client and assistant interaction
Adapts to your business — from solo use to large-scale deployment
Keeps your brand identity front and center

card.title: Customization & Branding
card.description: Your dashboard isn't just functional — it's an extension of your brand. Change themes, upload assets, and adjust language so every touchpoint feels consistent with your identity. Your clients see professionalism. You see total control.

finalCta.heading: Ready to Take Control?
finalCta.description: Your business runs better when everything connects. With the Advanced Dashboard, your AI assistant, analytics, and brand management come together — seamlessly.
